programme.title: Treasures Decoded 5
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: The third part of the nature documentary, produced over almost five years, concludes the trilogy almost two decades after the first series was broadcast.Its creators used pioneering film technologies, including:light drones, super-fast cameras and remotely controlled deep-sea submarines.In eight episodes, viewers will visit the most remote jungles, the darkest ocean depths, the world's largest caves and the hottest deserts and steppes.They will learn the story about nature's will to survive and the adaptive abilities of various species.The Earth is at a tipping point and changes in the natural world are felt in every ecosystem and affect numerous creatures.The series highlights the growing need to protect and restore nature.In the last episode, viewers will meet inspiring people from various corners of the world who are the face of change and saving the Earth.They are committed to risking their lives to protect the planet.Sir David Attenborough will guide the series Sir David Attenborough brings you closer to the farthest corners of the globe.Over the course of five years, the British biologist and his team visited 43 countries on six continents.They used technical innovations to show how the planet is changing from different perspectives.The first episode will take viewers, among others, to the infamous Skeleton Coast in Namibia.Here, the oldest desert in the world meets the cold waters of the Atlantic, and hungry lions hunt a colony of seabirds.In the lagoons of Mexican Yucatan, the waters are very salty.Despite unfavorable conditions, Caribbean flamingos appear here.Their offspring will have to survive tropical storms that arrive prematurely.Saving the planet In the next seven installments of the series, filmmakers will take viewers to the most remote jungles, the darkest ocean depths, the world's largest caves and the hottest deserts and steppes.In addition to fascinating stories about the nature that surrounds us, documentarians also raised issues related to its protection.The Earth is at a critical point, and changes in the natural environment are felt in every ecosystem and affect an increasing number of creatures.In the last episode, we will meet inspiring people from different parts of the world who are passionately involved in saving our planet.

programme.title: Empire with David Olusoga
programme.desc: British historian David Olusoga tells the story of Britain, examining how a small island became the center of the greatest empire in the history of the world.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Inside the Factory
programme.desc: The presenters visit the largest factories in the world and reveal the behind-the-scenes of the creation of popular products, normally inaccessible to ordinary consumers.

programme.title: Empire Builders
programme.desc: Rulers of European empires, including the Ottomans, built fortresses around the Mediterranean Sea.These buildings turned out to be later witnesses of powerful battles and the most important events of the millennium.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded 5
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive the long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive the long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded 5
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.

programme.title: Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities 4
programme.desc: The host shows creatures that amaze scientists.It presents interesting facts and explains where myths about certain animals come from.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Space
Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive the long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Daily struggles of daredevils from various regions of Alaska.The inhabitants of the four houses face further hardships of life in a frosty climate and fight to survive the long and dangerous winter.

programme.title: Treasures Decoded 5
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.

programme.title: Planet Earth 2
programme.desc: A fascinating natural spectacle.The creators of the program show the wealth of fauna and flora that inhabit the world.They visit all continents, where they observe commonly known and very rare species of animals and plants.Using the development of technology, they show life on Earth from a completely new perspective.They allow you to look at the world through the eyes of the creatures that inhabit it.Cameras placed very close record the normally elusive behavior of wild creatures.High-quality photos allow viewers to be in the very center of events - births, hunts or fights for leadership in the herd.All this is accompanied by commentary by David Attenborough, the famous naturalist, traveler and journalist.The series was divided into six parts.The first one reveals the richness of life on islands - from volcanic ones, through equatorial paradises, to Antarctica.The second episode focuses on mountains, the third - jungles, the fourth about deserts, and the fifth about steppes and savannas.The last one will present the life of animals in cities.

programme.title: Solar System
programme.desc: The host of the program, Professor Brian Cox, presents selected information about the solar system.Viewers will learn about planets and moons covered with volcanoes that erupt with fire and ice.In the following parts, the scientist talks about the most interesting atmospheric conditions that were noticed on celestial bodies neighboring the Earth.He visits landscapes created by dust whirls, mountains covered with metallic frost and monsoon rains on one of the moons.In addition, Professor Cox will introduce viewers to frozen regions of the solar system, including a dwarf planet with mountains of solid ice floating on it, as well as a black and white moon.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Another season of the documentary that shows the lives of people living in Alaska who hunt and prepare for the harsh winter.Temperatures in this area drop to -60 degrees Celsius.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Space
Treasures Decoded 5
programme.desc: The creators of the series conduct archaeological investigations into unsolved mysteries of antiquity.The emergence of new evidence gives researchers further opportunities to solve each of them.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: The third part of the nature documentary, produced over almost five years, concludes the trilogy almost two decades after the first series was broadcast.Its creators used pioneering film technologies, including:light drones, super-fast cameras and remotely controlled deep-sea submarines.In eight episodes, viewers will visit the most remote jungles, the darkest ocean depths, the world's largest caves and the hottest deserts and steppes.They will learn the story about nature's will to survive and the adaptive abilities of various species.The Earth is at a tipping point and changes in the natural world are felt in every ecosystem and affect numerous creatures.The series highlights the growing need to protect and restore nature.In the last episode, viewers will meet inspiring people from various corners of the world who are the face of change and saving the Earth.They are committed to risking their lives to protect the planet.Sir David Attenborough will guide the series.

programme.title: Changing Planet
programme.desc: The aim of a special BBC research project is to document the climate changes that have occurred on Earth over seven years.The station's presenters visit the most endangered ecosystems.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Presenter, writer and adventurer Ben Fogle travels to different parts of the world to meet people who have decided to leave the comfort of Western civilization and start a new life.
